cc:Work.dc:title: Figure V3.2.1
cc:Work.dc:description: Topological SU(2) double cover of SO(3), with antipodal identification and 2pi/4pi path classes.

g.text: SU(2) contains two spinor states, q and -q,
A single full turn is not homotopic to the identity;

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: middle; fill: #1f1f1f

g.text: SU(2): The Double Cover of Spatial Rotations

path.style: fill: #f4f4f4; stroke: #d9d9d9; stroke-linejoin: miter

text.style: font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: middle; fill: #1f1f1f

g.text: Fermions are SU(2) representations: spin-1/2 follows from the double cover.
